item.title: Lindsey Vonn in 'Stable Condition' After Terrifying Crash During 2026 Winter Olympics Skiing Final
item.description: The five-time Olympian was airlifted off the mountain after getting tripped up by a course marker just 13 seconds into her run on Feb. 8

item.title: “Young and the Restless”' Lucas Adams and Wife Shelby Wulfert Welcome Their First Baby, a Boy: 'Our Lives Are Forever Changed'
item.description: 'The Young and the Restless' star and his wife announced they were expecting in November

item.title: Melba Moore Shared a Dressing Room with 'Hilarious' Diane Keaton While They Were in “Hair” on Broadway (Exclusive)
item.description: The singer and actress reflects on her history-making career in her memoir 'This Is It — Marvelous... & Getting Better' and in an exclusive PEOPLE int...

item.title: Meet the Celebrity Fans Cheering for the Super Bowl-Bound Patriots and Seahawks
item.description: Who's rooting for who — and who may be placing some major bets come Sunday night?

item.title: Lindsey Vonn Slammed 'Ageism' Critiques for Skiing with a Torn ACL, 1 Day Before 2026 Winter Olympics Final Crash
item.description: “This ageism stuff is getting really old,” the Olympian, 41, said
